changes.summary: Added a fixed body-frame remap in MPU6050_Convert so the vertically mounted sensor is interpreted in chassis coordinates before attitude fusion.
Changed heading hold to use IMU heading directly when IMU data is valid instead of using encoder-contaminated yaw as the primary straight-line correction source.
Disabled encoder straight-balance compensation, zeroed static side trim, and reduced encoder weight in yaw fusion so control is less vulnerable to wheel slip.
